step.title: Define evaluation criteria
step.action: Extract evaluation criteria from requirements and constraints.
If product-brief or domain-research exist, load them for context.

step.title: Research technology options
step.action: Identify candidate technologies, frameworks, and platforms for each architectural concern.

step.title: Evaluate against criteria
step.action: Score each technology option against the defined criteria.

step.title: Recommend with trade-offs
step.action: Provide a clear recommendation with rationale and trade-off analysis.

step.title: Produce report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with research findings.
